news.headline: Everything Blockchain Inc. (OTCMKTS: EBZT) resolves all toxic convertible notes previously held by 1800 Diagonal Lending, LLC.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Everything Blockchain Inc. (OTCMKTS: EBZT) revealed that they have effectively resolved all harmful convertible notes that were formerly owned by 1800 Diagonal Lending, LLC. This move signifies the company's commitment to connecting established markets with new technologies like artificial intelligence and blockchain.

news.headline: Shareholders of Customers Bancorp (NYSE: CUBI) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Jan 31, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit aimed at recovering losses for investors in Customers Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: CUBI). The lawsuit is specifically targeting those who have suffered losses due to alleged wrongdoings by Customers Bancorp, Inc. The class definition includes all individuals who were shareholders of the company during the period in question. Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is leading the legal action on behalf of these investors to seek compensation for their losses.

news.headline: Ex-official involved in bribery case in Russia had $10M in Bitcoin seized; funds to be added to state revenue.
news.summary: The Russian state will convert the confiscated Bitcoin, which was taken from Marat Tambiev, a former ICRF staff member, into state revenue. The funds were held in a hardware crypto wallet.

news.headline: Contact Levi & Korsinsky before Jan 21, 2025 to discuss Xerox Holdings Corp. securities lawsuit (NASDAQ: XRX). Loss recovery for investors.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP issued a notification to investors in Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recuperate losses on behalf of Xerox shareholders. The legal action concerns allegations against Xerox Holdings Corporation and is open to investors who purchased shares between specific dates. This class action lawsuit highlights the importance of investor rights protection and seeks to address any potential damages suffered by shareholders.

news.headline: EXEL Industries on 10.31.2024 reports €16,969,750 share capital, with 095 550 356 RCS number.
news.summary: French company EXEL Industries, with a share capital of €16,969,750, is headquartered at 54 rue Marcel Paul, 51206 Epernay Cedex, France. It is registered with the Reims Companies Register as No. 095 550 356.

news.headline: Becrypt released VDI Guard to protect critical infrastructure from remote access protocol vulnerabilities.
news.summary: In London, Becrypt, a prominent cybersecurity company, has unveiled a new offering called Becrypt VDI Guard. This innovative solution is aimed at addressing the growing concerns related to security vulnerabilities in remote access protocols. With cyber threats evolving rapidly, protecting critical national infrastructure (CNI) has become a top priority. Remote access protocols like RDP, SSH, VDI, and VNC play a crucial role in modern IT infrastructure. Becrypt VDI Guard is designed to enhance security measures in this area.

news.headline: Fed’s Musalem suggests greater caution is warranted on reducing interest rates - WSJ.
Canada plots broad tariff retaliation if Trump starts trade war.
Stocks unfazed by increasing Treasury yields; fear of decline not presenting itself.
Turmoil in UK bonds could lead to delay in BOE rate cuts.
Deutsche Bank recommends selling sterling on a broad and trade-weighted basis.
GlobalLogic appoints Srini Shankar as President and CEO, starting February 3, 2025. Nitesh Banga steps down after joining in 2018.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, GlobalLogic Inc., part of the Hitachi Group and a top player in Digital Engineering, declared that Srinivas (Srini) Shankar, the Chief Business Officer and Global Industries Head, will become the new President and CEO starting February 3, 2025. Srini is taking over from Nitesh Banga, who opted to resign in order to explore fresh avenues beyond Hitachi and GlobalLogic. Nitesh had joined GlobalLogic in June 2018 and made significant contributions during his tenure.

news.headline: AAC Technologies presented advanced sensory solutions at CES 2025, enhancing digital experiences through visual, audio, and haptic elements. #innovation #CES2025
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 10, 2025, AAC Technologies unveiled innovative advancements in sensory interaction at CES 2025, the prominent consumer electronics and technology trade show. The exhibition highlighted cutting-edge experiences encompassing visual, audio, and haptic technologies. AAC Technologies demonstrated pioneering solutions aimed at enhancing sensory engagement in the digital realm, captivating audiences at the event.

news.headline: 'Oh' raises $4.5M to develop AI-based digital influencers; some agents bring in over $10,000 monthly revenue.
news.summary: According to the platform's CEO, certain AI agents developed by Oh are already yielding more than $10,000 in monthly revenue.

news.headline: Trump's plan to politicize Fed will boost inflation rates.
Supreme Court to review a law threatening to close TikTok, balancing national security with free speech.
news.summary: The judges are anticipated to make a prompt decision in the lawsuit, where national security worries regarding China clash with the First Amendment’s safeguarding of free speech.

news.headline: Impact of Northern Lights and digital photography on astrotourism, leading to surge in visitors by 20% last year.
China's central bank halts bond purchases amid deflation worries, aiming to curb bond market bubble caused by risk aversion.
news.summary: The surprising move aims to prevent a possible bubble in the bond market due to investors avoiding riskier assets such as stocks and real estate.

news.headline: Economists' influence wanes due to flawed forecasts and jargon. Can they regain credibility in shaping policy?
news.summary: For many years, economists have played a crucial role in influencing policy decisions regarding taxes and health care. However, their credibility has been undermined due to inaccurate predictions and the use of complex language. This has led to a lack of faith in their forecasts and recommendations. As a result, the public may be less likely to trust economic experts when it comes to critical issues such as fiscal policies and healthcare reforms. This highlights the importance of clear communication and accurate analysis in order to regain the trust of the public.

news.headline: FTSE 100 Update: Gilt yields up for 5th day, Pound at around $1.23.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, rebounding from a -3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Advanced economies are projected to grow by 5.4%, while emerging market and developing economies are expected to grow by 6%. In comparison, China's economy is forecasted to grow by 8.4% in 2021. This positive outlook is largely attributed to the rollout of vaccines, fiscal stimulus measures, and improving business and consumer confidence. However, there are concerns about uneven vaccine distribution and the emergence of new virus variants that could pose risks to the economic recovery.

news.headline: EBF: Three-month Euribor falls 2.3 BPS.
Trump has picked 8 economic advisors to support tariffs and tax cuts in his administration.
news.summary: The elected President, Donald J. Trump, has shifted gears from his initial term's team-of-rivals strategy. His selection of economic advisors reflects a focus on supporting tariffs and tax reductions.

news.headline: China Telecom's TeleNavi introduces voice-only intelligent location technology to help elderly overcome digital travel dilemma. (Characters: 111)
news.summary: In Hong Kong on January 10, 2025, a report highlighted the challenges faced by elderly individuals in adapting to digital technology advancements. Termed as the 'Digital Travel Dilemma,' the swift evolution of the internet has notably improved convenience for the younger demographic. However, the elderly population is encountering difficulties in keeping up with smartphone usage. This issue has become more prevalent as services such as e-map continue to grow in popularity.

news.headline: UK economic project under threat as bond selloff intensifies, with Reeves facing crucial turning point.
CoreWeave appoints Sandy Venugopal as new CIO to lead digital transformation, boosting innovation and growth efforts.
news.summary: CoreWeave has announced the appointment of Sandy Venugopal as its new Chief Information Officer. Venugopal will lead the company's IT and digital transformation efforts, focusing on driving innovation and fostering growth. This move comes as CoreWeave aims to strengthen its position in the market and capitalize on emerging opportunities. Venugopal's expertise in IT and technology will be instrumental in propelling the company forward. We are excited to see the impact of this strategic appointment on CoreWeave's future endeavors.

news.headline: Bybit & Block Scholes analyze BTC drop below $100k as market awaits "Crypto President" inauguration.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume globally, unveiled its most recent crypto derivatives report in collaboration with Blocks Scholes. The report, issued weekly, highlighted Bitcoin's decrease from $100,000 within the first week of the new year.

news.headline: ZWSOFT had a transformative 2024, focusing on sustainable innovation, with significant steps in driving innovation and collaboration.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on January 10, 2025, ZWSOFT experienced a year of change in 2024 as it embraced its new focus on Empowering Sustainable Innovation. Throughout the year, the ZWSOFT team made strides in promoting innovation, encouraging teamwork, and providing enduring benefits for customers and partners.

news.headline: Kremlin: Assume both trump and Putin are ready to meet - IFX
Kremlin: It looks like there will be developments on a possible Trump-Putin meeting once trump takes office on January 20th
Kremlin: It is therefore possible that another US sanctions package on Russia will be introduced by the Biden administration
AI showcased at CES Keynote, restoring voices for ALS patients, showcasing tech's impact on lives.
news.summary: During their keynote at CES, NVIDIA showcased the significant impact of AI, particularly in the realm of helping ALS patients restore their voices. This demonstration underscored the transformative power of technology in improving the lives of individuals. The event emphasized the real-world applications of AI, showcasing its potential to make a difference in society.

news.headline: Robinhood to unveil 2024 financial performance on Feb 12, 2025, with live earnings call. Stay tuned for the results.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. will release their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 12, 2025. The announcement will include a live earnings call to discuss the company's performance during that period.

news.headline: Gas prices in Europe are expected to decrease by the end of the week after a month of steady increases.
Bitcoin supply shortage possible with rising prices, boosting market outlook. Bitfinex Alpha report highlights bullish trend.
news.summary: The supply of Bitcoin is diminishing as its value surges to record levels, signaling positive momentum for the cryptocurrency sector, as reported by Bitfinex Alpha. This trend is driving optimism within the market as investors closely monitor the developments.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index drops below 50, lowest since Oct, with Bitcoin under $92K. BCH trading at $94,708.791 with index at 42.
news.summary: The CMC Crypto Fear and Greed Index has dropped below 50 to hit its lowest level since Oct. 14, while Bitcoin's price has fallen below $92,000. As of 3:20 am ET on Friday, Bitcoin was trading at $94,708.791, with the fear and greed index at 42. This index, a unique tool by CoinMarketCap, is used to measure the prevailing sentiment in the cryptocurrency market, with values ranging from 0 to 100. A lower index indicates extreme fear, while a higher value signifies extreme greed, impacting investor behavior. Investors can use this index to evaluate market sentiment.

news.headline: Q1 revenues for 2025 fiscal year surpass expectations, totaling over 100 million dollars.
Exosens surpasses 2024 IPO guidance with promising results, predicts low twenties EBITDA growth in 2025.
news.summary: Exosens reported estimated results for 2024 that exceeded the initial public offering (IPO) guidance. The company also revealed guidance for 2025, emphasizing a low twenties adjusted Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA) growth. This positive outlook suggests significant progress and potential success for Exosens in the upcoming years.

news.headline: New Xviral platform merges social media, gaming, and crypto, allowing users to earn and secure data. Token launched on Solana in Jan 2025.
news.summary: Xviral has recently launched a unique social platform that combines gaming, e-commerce, and cryptocurrency, allowing users to earn rewards and protect their data. This platform utilizes a hybrid model that incorporates both centralized and decentralized elements to boost efficiency. In January 2025, Xviral introduced a token on the Solana Blockchain to promote community involvement and ensure equitable distribution.

news.headline: Scaramucci plans to hold Bitcoin, aims to profit from altcoins like Solana. Expects Bitcoin market maturity.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the Chief Executive Officer of SkyBridge Capital, shared his profit-taking plan for cryptocurrencies recently. He revealed his decision to keep holding his Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and focus on alternative coins like Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) moving forward. In an interview with Altcoin Daily, Scaramucci discussed the indicators he pays attention to when considering selling a portion of his crypto assets. He expressed his belief in Bitcoin's market maturation and the possibility of Bitcoin lending gaining popularity. Detailed information can be found at Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Youdao reveals new AI-equipped Dictionary Pen X7 at CES 2025, highlights Chinese AI strength in education.
news.summary: At CES 2025 in Las Vegas, Youdao, a prominent Chinese intelligent learning company, unveiled the Youdao Dictionary Pen X7 series, equipped with AI technology. This demonstration highlights the prowess of 'Chinese AI' at the event, underscoring the company's innovation. The device stands out as a prime example of cutting-edge technology, emphasizing China's advancements in AI development on a global platform.

news.headline: 2024 saw growth in crypto industry with blockchain breakthroughs, Bitcoin surges amid favorable regulations; HTX 2025 outlook covers 5 sectors.
news.summary: In Singapore on January 10, 2025, the crypto industry in 2024 experienced notable advancements. Breakthroughs in blockchain technology and significant increases in Bitcoin price were witnessed. Additionally, a more accommodating regulatory landscape emerged, fostering growth in cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: CKGSB Professor Jin Zhao is the first Chinese business school scholar to win the AFA Award at the 2025 Annual Meeting in San Francisco.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Professor JIN Zhao, an Assistant Professor of Finance at Cheung Kong Graduate School of Business (CKGSB), was recognized with the prestigious Brattle Group Prize - Distinguished Papers during the 2025 American Finance Association (AFA) Annual Meeting in San Francisco.

news.headline: CoreWeave boosts board with Karen Boone appointment, adding corporate governance expertise.
news.summary: Karen Boone has joined CoreWeave as an independent board director, bringing valuable corporate governance expertise to the company. This strategic addition aims to strengthen CoreWeave's leadership team and drive growth.

news.headline: PCI Biotech grants share options to new CSO Morten Luhr; former CSO Anders Høgset becomes Scientific Advisor.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, PCI Biotech (OSE: PCIB) revealed that Morten Luhr has received share options after being named Chief Scientific Officer. Luhr took on the role in January 2025, while the previous CSO, Anders Høgset, will transition to a Scientific Advisor position with a 20% commitment.

news.headline: Mischler Financial Group appoints Andrew Cherna as Managing Director, Capital Markets. Veteran-owned bank aims to deepen relationships.
news.summary: Mischler Financial Group, the oldest diversity-certified investment bank in the U.S. owned and operated by service-disabled veterans, has appointed Andrew Cherna as the Managing Director, Capital Markets. In this new role, Mr. Cherna will report to Rob Karr, the Head of Capital Markets, to enhance connections with issuers and investors. The company aims to broaden its capabilities in the market with this appointment.

news.headline: Philippine banks team up to introduce PHPX stablecoin on Hedera for fast remittances and cross-border payments.
news.summary: Banks in the Philippines have come together to introduce the PHPX stablecoin, designed to facilitate instant remittances. This initiative will utilize Hedera's distributed ledger technology (DLT) network and efficient cross-border payment systems. The collaboration aims to streamline the remittance process, ensuring faster transactions for users.

news.headline: Biggest US and Canada Bitcoin ETFs: Canadian investors shifting to US, causing record outflows in Canada.
news.summary: Investors in the Canadian spot Bitcoin ETF have been shifting towards more liquid US options, leading to record outflows from crypto ETFs in Canada. The significant movement of investors has resulted in the largest outflows in the country's history, with substantial numbers transitioning to US alternatives.

news.headline: Dow surges over 100 points post Fed minutes; Investor sentiment declines, Fear and Greed index remains in 'Fear' zone.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in market sentiment, remaining in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw mostly positive results, with the Dow Jones index climbing over 100 points. The Federal Reserve's December meeting minutes revealed uncertainty regarding future rate cuts, with a careful eye on President-elect Donald Trump's policies and their potential impact on inflation. Acuity Brands Inc. (NYSE:AYI) reported lower revenue than expected for its fiscal first quarter. In economic news, U.S. private businesses added 122,000 workers to their payrolls in December, a decrease from previous numbers. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Earnings on Jan. 10, 2025:- Constellation Brands: $3.32 EPS, $2.54B revenue- E2open Parent Holdings: $0.05 EPS, $161M revenue- Neogen: Results pending.
news.summary: Several companies are scheduled to report their quarterly earnings before the bell, including:- Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) is expected to announce earnings of $3.32 per share with revenue totaling $2.54 billion.- E2open Parent Holdings (NYSE:ETWO) is forecasted to report earnings of $0.05 per share on revenue of $161.00 million.- Neogen (NASDAQ:NEOG) is also expected to reveal its quarterly earnings, with further details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: U.S. Bancorp to release Q4 results on Jan. 16. Predicted earnings: $1.05/share, revenue: $6.99B, up from $6.73B last year. Shares fell 0.4% to $48.52.
news.summary: Before the opening bell on Thursday, Jan. 16, U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $1.05 per share for the Minneapolis-based company, marking a significant increase from the 49 cents per share reported in the same period last year. U.S. Bancorp is expecting quarterly revenue to reach $6.99 billion, up from $6.73 billion in the prior year. In the third quarter, the company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings per share of $1.03, surpassing the consensus estimate of 99 cents. Despite this positive outlook, U.S. Bancorp shares closed at $48.52 on Wednesday, reflecting a 0.4% decrease. For those interested, additional analyst ratings can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.
